verdict.reason: Feasible, but the GPU floor consumes most of the budget headroom.
suggested_adjustments: Raise the ceiling by ~₹5,000 for a 12GB GPU.

parts.name: ASUS Dual GeForce RTX 4060 8GB
parts.justification: Cheapest in-stock 8GB card clearing the 1080p/144fps target.

parts.name: AMD Ryzen 5 7500F
parts.justification: 6c/12t, pairs with the AM5 board without bottlenecking the GPU.

parts.name: ASRock B650M-HDV/M.2
parts.justification: Cheapest in-stock AM5 microATX board with DDR5 + NVMe.

build.summary: A tight 1080p/144fps competitive-gaming build on AM5 with room to upgrade.
warnings: No compatible in-stock cooler under the ceiling — using the boxed AMD cooler.
